note: Take raw JSON string and output "pretty" version with provide indent level. Optionally sort the keys.

params.label: HTML
params.name: html
params.note: The HTML document or fragment to convert to JSON.

params.label: Indent
params.name: indent
params.note: The number of spaces to use for each indent level (default: 2).

params.label: Sort Keys
params.name: sort_keys
params.note: When enabled, JSON object keys are sorted alphabetically at every level. For HTML tree output this puts attrs before tag and is usually harder to read; leave off for tag, attrs, children order.
